blocked_capability_register.first_next_action: attach at least 12 local CASF/PDBBind case descriptors

handoff_slot.first_next_action: attach at least 12 local CASF/PDBBind case descriptors

blocked_capability_register.title: Public benchmark harness

raw_row_value_contract.boolean_label_policy: is_positive and is_decoy must parse to booleans and be mutually exclusive.

numeric_value_policy.score: must parse to a finite float; NaN and Infinity are rejected

raw_row_value_contract.row_integrity_policy: molecule_id must be nonblank, non-placeholder, and unique within each target.
raw_row_value_contract.score_direction_policy: score_direction must be higher_is_better or lower_is_better, with exactly one direction per target.
raw_row_value_contract.target_id_policy: target_id must be one of DRD2, HTR2A, or OPRM1; out-of-scope target rows are rejected before suite materialization.

row_source_receipt_requirements.provenance_ref_policy: provenance_ref must be nonblank and must not use local, fixture, mock, synthetic, placeholder, test, or file-only provenance prefixes
row_source_receipt_requirements.source_checksum_policy: source_checksum must be sha256:<64 hex> and not a repeated placeholder digest

source_receipt_requirements.source_artifact_sha256_policy: must be a sha256:<hex> reference matching the attached raw row artifact

operator_input_source_receipt_policy.source_artifact_sha256_policy: sha256:<64 lowercase or uppercase hex characters>

boolean_value_policy.local_min_survived: must parse to a boolean value

integer_value_policy.clash_count_after: must parse to a non-negative integer
integer_value_policy.clash_count_before: must parse to a non-negative integer

numeric_value_policy.post_refinement_energy_proxy: must parse to a finite float; NaN and Infinity are rejected
numeric_value_policy.pre_refinement_energy_proxy: must parse to a finite float; NaN and Infinity are rejected

rate_value_policy.contact_persistence_rate: must parse to a finite fraction from 0.0 to 1.0
rate_value_policy.h_bond_persistence_rate: must parse to a finite fraction from 0.0 to 1.0

row_value_contract.row_integrity_policy: case_id, source_family, and candidate_id must be nonblank and non-placeholder; candidate_id and top_k_rank must be unique per case.
row_value_contract.row_receipt_policy: provenance_ref must be non-placeholder and source_checksum must be a non-placeholder sha256:<hex> row receipt.
row_value_contract.top_k_rank_policy: top_k_rank must parse to a positive integer not exceeding max_top_k (20); ranks within each case must form a contiguous prefix starting at 1.
row_value_contract.top_k_survival_scope_policy: PocketMD Lite refinement rows are bounded to upstream top-k candidates only; top_k_rank must be between 1 and 20.
row_value_contract.uncertainty_interval_policy: uncertainty_interval or uncertainty_low/high must parse to finite numbers with high >= low and a nonblank unit.
row_value_contract.upstream_top_k_receipt_policy: Each refinement row must include upstream_top_k_provenance_ref and upstream_top_k_source_checksum proving the candidate came from the upstream ranked top-k set; local, fixture, mock, synthetic, placeholder, test, and file-only provenance are rejected.

source_checksum_policy.accepted_checksum_format: sha256:<64 lowercase or uppercase hex characters>

source_receipt_requirements.source_artifact_sha256_policy: must be a sha256:<hex> reference matching the attached top-k row artifact

minimum_evidence.upstream_top_k_receipt_policy: Rows must prove the candidate came from the upstream ranked top-k set before Lite refinement.

first_operator_evidence_gap.first_next_action: attach at least 12 local CASF/PDBBind case descriptors

checksum_policy.accepted_checksum_format: sha256:<64 lowercase or uppercase hex characters>
checksum_policy.source_checksum: Operator may provide a source bundle checksum; otherwise the materializer derives a stable checksum from computed local source-file checksums.
checksum_policy.source_file_checksums: Materializer computes one checksum per local protein/reference-ligand/predicted-pose file and writes them to each manifest case row.

manifest_contract.claim_boundary: This contract describes the local operator intake needed to materialize the CASF/PDBBind subset manifest. It does not fetch, redistribute, or license public benchmark data.

validation_rules: benchmark_split is one of the supported CASF/PDBBind split labels
benchmark_split stays attached to every materialized case row
atom_ids are unique within each case
each permutation is zero-based over ligand_atom_order_contract.atom_ids

owner_actions: attach at least 12 local CASF/PDBBind case descriptors
attach protein, reference ligand, and predicted pose or docking-run files
declare license or accession references without redistributing restricted source data
declare benchmark_split for every case using a supported CASF/PDBBind split label
declare ligand atom order and symmetry permutations for every case
declare pose_success_metric=symmetry_aware_ligand_rmsd_angstrom and a positive RMSD threshold

first_operator_handoff.first_next_action: attach at least 12 local CASF/PDBBind case descriptors

minimum_evidence.coordinate_contract: reference_atoms and predicted_atoms in the declared ligand atom order

check_definitions.description: reference and predicted ligand coordinates are finite 3D values
reference/predicted ligand atoms share a declared atom-order contract
pose success metric is explicitly symmetry-aware ligand RMSD
allowed symmetry permutations are explicit zero-based atom-index maps
predicted ligand coordinates must not contain impossible self-clashes
protein structure and binding-site context are present
pose success uses the best rigid-aligned RMSD over allowed symmetry permutations

active_decoy_policy.per_target_requirement: each target must contain at least one active molecule and one decoy molecule

boolean_label_policy.is_active: must be a JSON boolean true/false; strings and numbers are rejected

numeric_value_policy.score: must parse to a finite float; NaN and Infinity are rejected

row_integrity_policy.purpose: Duplicate enrichment targets or scored molecules cannot be used to inflate Public Benchmark enrichment coverage or active/decoy counts.

score_direction_policy.blank_values: rejected; no implicit default is applied

source_checksum_policy.accepted_checksum_format: sha256:<64 lowercase or uppercase hex characters>

boolean_value_policy.pose_success: must be a JSON boolean true/false; strings and numbers are rejected

numeric_value_policy.pose_success_rmsd_threshold_angstrom: must parse to a finite positive float; NaN, Infinity, zero, and negative thresholds are rejected
numeric_value_policy.score: must parse to a finite float; NaN and Infinity are rejected
numeric_value_policy.symmetry_aware_rmsd_angstrom: must parse to a finite non-negative float; NaN, Infinity, and negative RMSD values are rejected

row_integrity_policy.purpose: Duplicate comparison cases or engine runs cannot be used to inflate Vina/GNINA case coverage, engine coverage, or pose-success summaries.

score_direction_policy.blank_values: rejected; no implicit default is applied

source_checksum_policy.accepted_checksum_format: sha256:<64 lowercase or uppercase hex characters>

harness_bundle_index.claim_boundary: Indexes local public-benchmark harness artifacts only; it does not fetch, license, redistribute, or approve external benchmark data.
